title: Xiaomi Smart Band 8 Active
short: Water resistant to 50 meters. Up to 14 days battery life.
description: Xiaomi Smart Band 8 Active — long battery life, heart-rate monitoring, sleep tracking and multiple sports modes. Premium silicon strap and lightweight.

title: New Google Speaker Nest Audio
description: Google Nest Audio delivers clear sound, improved bass and voice assistant features. Compact and stylish design fits any home.

title: Robot Vacuum Cleaner
description: Automated floor cleaning robot with multiple cleaning modes, remote control via app and scheduled cleaning.

title: Compact Coffee Machine
description: Compact and stylish coffee maker suitable for espresso, americano and more. Easy to clean and maintain.

title: Wireless Charger Pro
description: Fast 20W wireless charger with thermal protection and smart coil alignment.
